params.TgtPrompt: Select target attacking or blocking creature
params.SpellDescription: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by target attacking or blocking creature this turn. If {R} was spent to cast this spell, CARDNAME deals damage to that creature's controller equal to the creature's power.

remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target attacking or blocking creature
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt by target attacking or blocking creature this turn. If {R} was spent to cast this spell, CARDNAME deals damage to that creature's controller equal to the creature's power.
